metadata.name: Manage Change Control for an SOP

description: A process owner needs to update a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) and must manage the change through a formal change control process.

nodes.task_description: Initiate a new change control record in the quality management system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a new change control record, describing the reason for the change.

nodes.task_description: Attach the redlined version of the SOP to the change control record.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully uploads the revised SOP.

nodes.task_description: Route the change control record for review and approval by the required stakeholders (e.g., department head, QA).

expected_outcome.value: Agent routes the record for electronic signature.

nodes.task_description: Once approved, make the new version of the SOP effective and obsolete the old version.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the SOP status in the document management system and triggers retraining notifications.
